description_long: This is a tall, freestanding shelving unit with a modern industrial design, featuring a black metal frame and five rectangular brown wooden shelves. The structure is divided into two vertical sections, with the left side having evenly spaced shelves and the right side featuring staggered shelf placement, creating a visually dynamic look. The open-frame design allows for visibility and access from multiple angles, making it suitable for displaying or storing items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or lofts. The shelves appear sturdy and are supported by thin metal bars, with no visible doors, drawers, or enclosed compartments. The overall construction suggests durability and the ability to support moderate to heavy objects. The minimalist aesthetic and neutral color palette make it versatile for various urban settings.
description: A tall, freestanding shelving unit with a black metal frame and brown wooden shelves, featuring open and staggered shelf placement. Its modern, industrial design is suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front and rear views show the open shelving structure, with staggered shelves on the right and evenly spaced shelves on the left.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow depth and alignment of the shelves, emphasizing the open frame and shelf thickness.
description_view_2: Opposite front and rear views, highlighting the staggered shelf arrangement and the solid back panel on one section.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1, showing the linear arrangement and open sides of the shelving unit.
